titleStmt.title: SII 23.117: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 117. (A.R. No. 117 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Kośakkuḍi-Perumāḷ temple—on the east wall of the maṇḍapa Jat. Vīra-Pāṇḍya: year 28, 82nd day: Month Puraṭṭādi

summary.p: This registers an endowment of 10 mā of land at Madiḷkkuṟichchi free of all taxes by order of the king, for the maintenance of a feeding house for Brāhmaṇas and the Ēka-daṇḍi and Tri-daṇḍi sanyāsins, established on the bank (Śittakkarai) of the river Taṇporundappēraṟu by one Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ Rājākkaṇāyanār alias Toṇḍaimāṉār of Puduvūr. The nature of the several taxes which are specified under exemption is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī vira pāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu puraṭṭātimātam
svastiśrī prasātañceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tribhuvaṉaccakravatti ko ṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ mu
ḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrī rājarājaccaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyārk kut taṇporuntapperā
ṟṟil cittakkarai Aḷanāṭṭup putuvūrt tirunilakaṇṭaṉ Irācāk kaṇāyaṉārāṉa toṇṭaimāṉār
kaṟpitta Ūṭṭil Uṇṇum brāhmaṇarkaḷ bhojaṉattukkum Ekadaṇḍi sanyāsikaḷukkum tridaṇḍi
sanyāsikaḷukkum śikṣaikkum Ivarkaḷukku bhojanamum śikṣaiyum camaikkum perkkum veṇ
ṭum Ivaiyiṟṟukkum taṅkaḷurt teṉpiṭākai matiḷkkuṟiccippaṟṟil teṉṉāṟṟukku meṟkum cinātaṉukku vaṭakkum
mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñceyyil vaṭakkaṭaiyanilam Araimāvum nālāñ cey nilam Orumāvum Aiñcāñcey nila
m Orumāvum Āṟāñcey nilam Orumāvum Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇ ṭāñcey nilam Oru māvum muṉṟāñcey nilam Orumā
vum nālāñcey nilam Orumāvum Aiñcāñcey nilam Orumāvum Ivvati kiḻakku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟām ceyyil
vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Araimāvum nālāñcey nilam Irumāvum Aiñcāñ cey nilam Orumāvum Āka nilam pattu mā In
nilam pattumāvum kār pacāṉam ciṟukoṭai vāṉpayir puṉpayir Uṭpaṭa muṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa payirkaḷum ceytukoḷ
vatāka Irupatteṭṭāvatu puraṭṭātimāta mutal Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭuttu Innilattāl varum kaṭamai An
tarāyam poṉvari viṉiyokam puṟavuṭal maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Upāti kaḷum sabhāviṉiyokam viṭṭuttevai Āṉaiccālai kutirai
ppanti Uḷḷiṭṭa pala tevaikaḷum vācalpeṟu Ilāñciṉaippeṟu Olai Eḻuttu viṉiyokam pañcupili kāttikaippaccai sandhivik
kirahappeṟu Uṭpaṭat taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam Erivari Iṉavari miṉvari kuḷattevai kālttevai maṟṟum Eppe
ṟpaṭṭa Iṟaittevaikaḷum poṉ mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttu variyilārk kaṇakkilum kaḻikkac coṉṉom Ippaṭi
Iṟaikkaṇakkiluṅ kaḻittu cantirātittaval cellak kalliluñ cempi lum veṭṭik kuṭukka Ivai peṇṇākaṭamu
ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭu nāḷ Eṇpattiraṇṭiṉālum prasādañ ceytaruḷittu sabhaip perumakkaḷ paṇit
taruḷa tirumukappaṭi kallil veṭṭiṉeṉ Ivvūr cippācāriyaṉ kāḷi tiruvaṉāyiṉa kāliṅkarāyaācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 23.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
